---
title: "Zixuan Fang"
---

## About me

I am a PhD candidate at Monash Business School, Monash University. My research lies at the intersection of quantitative finance, decision theory, and risk analytics.

My current research focuses on preference structures in portfolio choice, especially the distinction between risk aversion and strength of preference in dynamic decision-making models.

## Research interests

- Quantitative finance
- Portfolio choice
- Decision theory
- Risk preferences
- Risk analytics

## Links

- [CV](cv.qmd)
- LinkedIn: add your LinkedIn link here
- Email: add your Monash email here
